race.comment: NONEOFYOURBUSINESS (11) ended last campaign on a positive note at Albany and has trialled well coming into her first-up effort today. Brad Parnham sticks from her latest trial and she's shown versatility early in her career. Can resume on a winning note judging by her latest trial. PARTAY (6) gets Pike on board for the first time today after showing glimpses in his debut campaign. He won a Lark Hill trial recently and lines up here despite the wide draw. Wouldn't surprise to see him get back and storm over the top with a bold performance. WESTERN JET (4) pulled up with an issue before the break, but his trial coming in suggests he's back on song. CJP hops back on board today and a forward showing is expected. WHITE HOT (10) looks better suited today stepping out in distance and she can land the knockout blow. BONDI BUSINESS (3) won't be far away.
